bird.name: 白腹长嘴山鹑
bird.summary: 白腹长嘴山鹑（台湾作侯氏山鶉）（学名：Rhizothera dulitensis），又名杜利特山长嘴山鹑，是鸡形目雉科的一种鸟类。 特征 白腹长嘴山鹑体重约746.72克，翼长约179.2毫米，嘴峰长约36.1毫米，喙宽度约11.8毫米，喙厚度约12毫米，跗蹠长约54.7毫米，…

relations.subject: 白腹长嘴山鹑
relations.evidence: Orenstein et al. (2010) suggest that the partridge may be seriously threatened by habitat degradation and hunting, and that an important conservation priority is its rediscovery. BirdLife International considers that it may have been in rapid decline because of habitat destruction and degradation, and that its taxonomic status should be investigated
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
